sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GDXY Stock Fund Price and Chart — BOATS:GDXY
feed.summary: The YieldMax Gold Miners Option Income Strategy ETF (GDXY) aims to generate monthly income by providing exposure to the price returns of the VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) using a synthetic covered call strategy. The fund utilizes standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options, including synthetic long exposure, covered call writing, and US Treasuries for collateral. GDXY has an indicated dividend yield of 75.14%, assets under management of $287.37 million, and an expense ratio of 1.00%, having launched on May 20, 2024.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: ResMed Q3 2026 reports mixed results, stock steady
feed.summary: ResMed (RMD) reported mixed Q3 2026 results, surpassing EPS forecasts while falling short on revenue. Despite the mixed financial performance, the company's stock remained stable in aftermarket trading. Key highlights include strong EPS growth and significant revenue increase, driven by mask and accessories sales, alongside strategic investments and an acquisition in the sleep health market.

feed.title: Alliant Energy Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) announced its First Quarter 2026 results via a press release distributed by Quantisnow. Quantisnow, a real-time market data and news platform, provided this insight along with recent analyst ratings and related insider transaction filings for Alliant Energy.

feed.title: Globe Life Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.33 a Share, Payable July 31 to Shareholders of Record on July 6
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.33 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on July 31 to shareholders who are on record as of July 6. This decision reflects the company's consistent dividend policy.

feed.title: AIG Posts Strong Q1 Results, Boosts Dividend Again
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with net income per diluted share rising 22% and adjusted after-tax income per diluted share jumping 80%. The company's General Insurance segment showed significant underwriting and premium growth, leading to an improved combined ratio. AIG also announced an 11% increase in its quarterly dividend, marking the fourth consecutive year of double-digit hikes, and completed strategic equity investments.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges Gemini Space Station
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has announced a class action lawsuit against Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ:GEMI). The lawsuit, filed in the Southern District of New York, alleges that Gemini made false statements about the viability of its crypto platform and international expansion. Investors who purchased Gemini securities between September 12, 2025, and February 17, 2026, and suffered losses, are encouraged to contact the firm by May 18, 2026, to discuss their legal rights or apply to be lead plaintiff.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts Afya (NASDAQ:AFYA) Price Target to $21.50
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Afya (NASDAQ:AFYA) from $22.00 to $21.50, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 49.20% from the stock's current price. Other analysts have also recently commented on Afya, with one strong buy rating, one buy rating, and six hold ratings, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and a price target of $17.20.

feed.title: FirstService (TSE:FSV) Reaches New 52-Week Low - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: FirstService (TSE:FSV) shares hit a new 52-week low of C$181.49, trading down 0.8% intraday, despite analysts maintaining a "Buy" rating with an average target of C$209.00. The company faces a high valuation (P/E 51.27) and modest profitability, with recent insider selling including a director's sale of 10,000 shares. FirstService operates in residential property management and property services through various brands.

feed.title: [Form 4] PayPal Holdings, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc.'s SVP and Chief Accounting Officer, Chris Natali, sold 1,337 shares of common stock at $49.46 per share, totaling $66,128. This transaction was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 plan adopted in November 2025, reducing Natali's direct holdings to 1,586 shares. The filing indicates a "Neutral" impact and "Negative" sentiment.

feed.title: Vistra Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.2290 a Share, Payable June 30 to Holders of Record June 22
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.2290 per share. This dividend will be payable on June 30 to shareholders of record as of June 22. The news was published on April 30, 2026, by MT Newswires.

feed.title: Is Viatris (VTRS) One of the Best Medical Stocks to Buy Under $30?
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. (NASDAQ: VTRS) is highlighted as one of the best medical stocks under $30, with Barclays recently increasing its price target to $17 and maintaining an Overweight rating. The pharmaceutical company is expected to see significant developments and catalysts in fiscal year 2026, which could drive its stock higher despite a muted market response to previous announcements. Barclays emphasizes the company's valuation, trading at approximately 6 times its earnings, and the unrecognized potential in its revenue growth and pipeline.

feed.title: Evercore Cuts Baxter (BAX) Price Target, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI analyst Vijay Kumar reduced the price target for Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) from $23 to $22, while maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment follows Baxter's recent introduction of the IV Verify Line Labeling System, an automated solution designed to enhance medication administration safety and streamline nursing workflows. Despite the maintained Outperform rating, the article suggests that some AI stocks may offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe compared to BAX.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Essex Property Trust beats Q1 2026 earnings estimates
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust reported stronger-than-expected Q1 2026 earnings with an EPS of $1.65 against a $1.42 forecast and revenue of $480.41 million, slightly above the anticipated $479.95 million. Despite the earnings beat, the stock declined by 1.22% in aftermarket trading, potentially due to its InvestingPro "Most Overvalued" flagging and trading above its Fair Value. The company maintained its full-year guidance, highlighting its strong financial position and an InvestingPro tip noted 33 consecutive years of dividend payments.

feed.title: Transcript: Amgen Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Amgen reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, with a 45% non-GAAP operating margin and a 16% increase in R&D spending, driven by investments in Maritide, Imdeltra, and Opaciran. The company raised its full-year 2026 revenue guidance to $37.1 billion to $38.5 billion and non-GAAP EPS to $21.70 to $23.10, expressing confidence in its emerging growth drivers. Key strategic advancements include further development of Maritide for obesity management, progress in cardiovascular prevention with Repatha, and innovation in oncology with Imdeltra and Zaleridomig, alongside leveraging AI for operational efficiency and drug discovery.

feed.title: Globe Life sets $0.33 dividend, July 31 payout for shareholders
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share. Shareholders recorded as of July 6, 2026, will receive this dividend, which is scheduled to be paid on July 31, 2026. The company specializes in life and supplemental health insurance for the middle-income market.

feed.title: American Express Expands High Value Spend With Gold Refresh And Lowe’s Card
feed.summary: American Express is enhancing its Gold Card with new dining and travel benefits and a revamped digital experience, without increasing the annual fee. Concurrently, it has partnered with Lowe's and Synchrony to introduce a co-branded card for professionals, expanding its reach into business customer relationships. These initiatives aim to capture high-value consumer and business spending by offering richer rewards and broader acceptance, highlighting Amex's strategy to maintain relevance with key customer segments.

feed.title: Monolithic Power Systems Prevails in Patent Infringement Lawsuit Brought by Bel Power Solutions in West Texas, with Bel Power Solutions Paying Costs
feed.summary: Monolithic Power Systems (MPS) announced its victory in a patent infringement lawsuit filed by Bel Power Solutions in the U.S. District Court for the Western District of Texas. The court granted MPS's motion for summary judgment of non-infringement on all six asserted patent claims. As a result, Bel Power Solutions agreed to pay MPS's court costs of $50,000 and acknowledged MPS as the prevailing party.

feed.title: [Form 4] Corteva, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Corteva, Inc. director Karen H. Grimes reported the acquisition of 2,350 shares of common stock as part of her compensation, which included 68.7043 shares from dividend reinvestment. This transaction, reported on a Form 4, was a routine grant and not an open-market purchase. Following this, Grimes' direct holdings in Corteva common stock increased to 18,272.0829 shares.

feed.title: FinancialContent - Starfighters Space Announces Availability of Airborne Aerodynamic Test Platform for U.S. Defense and Aerospace Community
feed.summary: Starfighters Space, Inc. has announced the availability of its F-104 Starfighter fleet as an airborne aerodynamic test platform for the U.S. defense and aerospace community. These modified supersonic jets can replicate real-world aerodynamic conditions for testing articles, a capability traditionally difficult to achieve in ground-based facilities. This offering addresses the growing demand for hypersonic and space development test infrastructure, providing a "wind tunnel in the sky" that significantly speeds up testing timelines.

feed.title: DexCom Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: DexCom reported a 15% increase in first-quarter revenue, reaching $1.19 billion, driven by strong demand for its CGM products, especially with the launch of the G7 15-day system and expanded insurance coverage. The company secured a significant reimbursement win with Prime Therapeutics for the commercial type 2 non-insulin population, set to cover over 7 million lives by year-end. DexCom maintained its full-year revenue guidance while raising its operating profit and adjusted EBITDA margin guidance, demonstrating strong operational execution and cost control.

feed.title: Euroseas Ltd. Announces Expansion of its Feeder Containership Newbuilding Program Ordering Two 2,800 teu High-Reefer Vessels and Two 1,800 teu Vessels
feed.summary: Euroseas Ltd. announced the expansion of its feeder containership newbuilding program with the order of four additional vessels. This includes two 2,800 teu high-reefer container vessels and two 1,800 teu container vessels, bringing their total newbuilding program to ten vessels. The company's CEO, Aristides Pittas, highlighted this expansion as a continued commitment to growing and modernizing their fleet and enhancing long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: Sunoco, Energy Transfer Pipeline Arguments Center on Venue Limbo
feed.summary: A federal appeals panel is reviewing whether Energy Transfer LP and Sunoco Pipeline LP are exempt from a negligence lawsuit brought by Pennsylvania residents regarding the Twin Oaks Pipeline leak. The Third Circuit questioned the involvement of Energy Transfer's subsidiary, R&M LLC, in the pipeline operations, as a lower court had previously remanded the case to state court based on a remediation order involving both Sunoco and R&M. The core issue revolves around the appropriate venue for the lawsuit concerning the 2025 jet fuel leak.

feed.title: Director Janet Giesselman of Corteva (NYSE: CTVA) receives 2,350-share stock award
feed.summary: Corteva (NYSE: CTVA) director Janet Plaut Giesselman was granted 2,350 shares of common stock at no cost, which increased her direct holdings to 20,006.9028 shares. This award is compensation-related and not an open-market purchase. Her total includes 39.0792 shares acquired through dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock examines delisting from LSE, closing UK mill
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock is considering delisting from the London Stock Exchange (LSE) to simplify its listing structure and reduce costs, with a review expected to conclude in May. The company also announced the closure of a high-cost mill in Birmingham, UK, and four converting operations in the UK and Netherlands. Despite a challenging first quarter due to weather and muted consumer confidence, the company reported strong demand and is implementing containerboard price increases.

feed.title: [Form 4] Corteva, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: A recent Form 4 filing indicates Corteva, Inc.'s director, Jean-Marc Gilson, received a grant of 2,350 shares of Common Stock as compensation with a stated price of $0.00 per share. This transaction was an award rather than a purchase, increasing Gilson's direct holdings to 2,350 shares of Corteva Common Stock following the grant. The filing, dated April 28, 2026, has been assessed as having a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Cummins Inc (CMI) Stock Up 5.0% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 86/100
feed.summary: Cummins Inc (CMI) stock rose 5.0% to $671.01, reaching near its 52-week high, despite being deemed 119.1% overvalued by GF Value™ at $306.27. While the company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 86, driven by high profitability and growth, concerns are raised by insider selling totaling $19.8M and a significantly higher P/E ratio compared to its historical median. Investors are cautioned due to the elevated valuation and potential risks.

feed.title: RTX Declares 7.4% Dividend Increase
feed.summary: RTX Corp (RTX) announced a 7.4% dividend increase to $0.73 per share, payable on June 11 to shareholders of record as of May 22, 2026. While this reflects a positive signal to investors and the company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 87/100, its high P/E ratio of 33.03 suggests it might be overvalued, and significant insider selling raises cautionary flags for potential investors.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) Issues FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) has released its FY 2026 earnings guidance, projecting an EPS of $6.600-$6.900, aligning with the consensus estimate of $6.740, and also provided Q2 2026 guidance. The company's stock experienced a slight dip, trading down 0.2%, but it recently increased its quarterly dividend and authorized a $600 million stock buyback plan. Analysts have issued varied ratings, with a consensus "Hold," and recent insider selling along with institutional investor activity has been noted.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) Releases Q2 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) has released its Q2 2026 earnings guidance, projecting an EPS of $2.50-$2.60, which falls below the consensus estimate of $2.73. Analysts have predominantly issued "Hold" ratings for the stock, with an average target price of $130.18. The company's shares traded up 2.6% on Thursday, and insider selling activity and institutional investor movements were also reported.

feed.title: Is Agilent Technologies a Good Stock to Buy?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Agilent Technologies, Inc. (A) as a potential investment, drawing from a bullish thesis by Quality At A Fair Price. It highlights Agilent's strong market position and projected 13.44% forward annual return, driven by its current dividend yield, potential valuation reversion, and robust earnings growth. While dividend growth has slowed, the company's low payout ratio and consistent earnings expansion suggest long-term value creation.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: Axon Enterprise (AXON) and Waste Management (WM)
feed.summary: Two analysts have issued bullish sentiments on Industrial Goods sector companies Axon Enterprise (AXON) and Waste Management (WM). Jonathan Ho from William Blair maintained a Buy rating on Axon Enterprise, while James Schumm from TD Cowen assigned a Buy rating to Waste Management. The average price targets suggest significant upside for both stocks.

feed.title: Lansing Street Advisors Acquires New Stake in BlackRock CORO ETF
feed.summary: Lansing Street Advisors has acquired a new stake in the BlackRock ETF Trust - iShares International Country Rotation Active ETF (NASDAQ:CORO), purchasing 233,608 shares valued at approximately $7.51 million in the first quarter of 2026. This acquisition represents 1.89% of their reportable assets under management and places CORO among their significant holdings, as the ETF has shown strong performance. The actively managed CORO fund provides global equity market exposure through a rules-based country rotation strategy, attracting both institutional and individual investors.

feed.title: Everest Group (EG) Valuation Check After Revenue Miss And Earnings Beat
feed.summary: Everest Group (EG) recently announced first-quarter earnings with a mix of softer revenue and stronger profitability, leading to a 6.4% 1-month share price return. Despite an earnings beat, the stock is trading near analysts' price targets, prompting a valuation check. The company is considered 7% undervalued by Simply Wall St's narrative, with a fair value of $371.53, based on strong growth opportunities from natural catastrophes driving reinsurance demand and pricing.

feed.title: American Electric Power Plan Highlights $72b Grid Spend And Valuation Debate
feed.summary: American Electric Power (AEP) shareholders have approved a US$72 billion capital plan focused on significant investments in generation, transmission, and distribution infrastructure. This plan aims to upgrade the grid, prepare for increased electricity demand from AI-related data centers, and work with regulators to limit rate increases. For investors, the plan provides clarity on AEP's resource allocation and strategy amid growing demand and grid reliability concerns.

feed.title: Glucotrack (NASDAQ: GCTK) swaps $988K debt for 1.3M new shares
feed.summary: Glucotrack, Inc. announced an Exchange Agreement to convert a $988,000 promissory note into 1.3 million shares of its common stock. This debt-for-equity swap reduces the company's note principal while increasing its share count; however, the issuance is subject to a 19.9% beneficial ownership limitation, meaning shares may be issued in tranches. The transaction is a balance-sheet adjustment aimed at restructuring capital without new financing.

feed.title: “A Lot Of Legal Trouble”: Delta Air Lines Passenger Opens Door While Aircraft Is Stuck On Tarmac
feed.summary: A Delta Air Lines passenger, identified as Thomas Ryan, opened the emergency exit of a Boeing 737-900ER after severe thunderstorms delayed his flight from Atlanta to Chicago. The incident caused the flight, carrying 168 passengers, to return to the gate, where Ryan was removed by law enforcement and is likely to face federal charges. The emergency slide did not deploy, and the flight eventually departed several hours later.

feed.title: Fluent (NASDAQ: FLNT) details 2025 pay, ownership and governance in 10-K/A
feed.summary: Fluent, Inc. filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) detailing its 2025 corporate governance, executive compensation, and ownership information. The filing reveals CEO Donald Patrick's total compensation, the company's net loss, and the beneficial ownership stakes of its co-founders and major shareholders. The report also highlights the independence of its board committees and its equity compensation plans.

feed.title: Long term debt to total assets ratio of Gladstone Investment Corporation – FWB:1G3
feed.summary: This article provides financial data for Gladstone Investment Corporation (FWB:1G3), specifically focusing on its long-term debt to total assets ratio. It indicates that data is provided by ICE Data Services and FactSet, with SEC filings from Quartr. The content mainly consists of navigation and boilerplate information from TradingView.

feed.title: U.S. Stocks: Dow Inc. rose for the first time in six days, up 790 points; Nasdaq hit a record high (June 30) ☆ Updated
feed.summary: U.S. stocks saw significant gains on June 30, with Dow Inc. breaking a six-day losing streak to rise by 790 points. The Nasdaq Composite achieved a new record high, indicating strong performance in technology and growth sectors. This broad market rally suggests a positive end to the trading period.

feed.title: Expedia, Newmont, and 7 More Dividend Stocks That Look Good in a Rally
feed.summary: The S&P 500 has experienced a rally, gaining almost 5% for the year after recovering from an Iran war-driven low. For investors wary of chasing high-flying stocks, a select group of promising investments, including Expedia and Newmont, are presented as good options regardless of market conditions.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks To Acquire AI Gateway Startup Portkey
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks announced its plan to acquire Portkey, an AI gateway startup, to enhance its AI security platform, Prisma AIRS. Portkey offers a centralized control plane for managing and protecting AI agents, processing trillions of tokens monthly. This acquisition is part of Palo Alto Networks' recent series of strategic acquisitions, including CyberArk, Koi, and Chronosphere.

feed.title: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
feed.summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) reported Q1 CY2026 results that missed Wall Street's expectations for both revenue and adjusted EPS. Revenue grew 2.6% year-on-year to $6.02 billion, falling short of analyst estimates by 5%, while adjusted EPS of $2.60 missed by 12.9%. Despite management reiterating full-year adjusted EPS guidance, the stock traded down immediately after the report due to the weaker-than-expected quarter.

feed.title: GreenTree posts 2025 annual report online, offers free hard copies
feed.summary: GreenTree Hospitality Group (NYSE: GHG) has filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. SEC on April 30, 2026. The report is available on the company's investor relations website and the SEC website. Shareholders and ADS holders can also request a free hard copy of the audited consolidated financial statements by contacting GreenTree's Investor Relations department.

feed.title: Green Dot (NYSE: GDOT) outlines merger plan and executive pay in 2025 10-K/A
feed.summary: Green Dot Corporation filed an amendment to its 2025 annual report, detailing executive and board compensation tied to performance, including above-target short-term incentive payouts due to exceeding financial plans. The amendment also outlines proposed transactions with CommerceOne Financial and Smith Ventures, involving a complex merger and the sale of Green Dot's non-bank fintech business for $690 million. These transactions, still subject to approvals, aim to restructure the company and fund cash consideration for shareholders.

feed.title: First Northwest Bancorp (NASDAQ:FNWB) Releases Earnings Results, Misses Estimates By $0.04 EPS
feed.summary: First Northwest Bancorp (NASDAQ:FNWB) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting $0.00 EPS, missing analyst estimates by $0.04, with revenue of $16.45 million against an estimated $16.80 million. Following the report, the stock traded up 0.3% to $10.00. Insider transactions show CEO Curt Queyrouze recently increased his stake by 9.54%, while institutional investors hold approximately 66.11% of the company's stock.

feed.title: First Aviation Services, Inc. Announces Definitive Agreement to be Acquired by AMETEK, Inc.
feed.summary: First Aviation Services Inc., a leader in component maintenance, repair, and overhaul for military, corporate, and airline markets, has announced a definitive agreement to be acquired by AMETEK, Inc. Paul Bolton will continue to lead First Aviation Services as President & COO, operating as a business unit within AMETEK's MRO Division. This acquisition is expected to broaden AMETEK's MRO services and leverage both companies' strengths for continued growth.

feed.title: Five9’s (NASDAQ:FIVN) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates, Stock Jumps 24.2%
feed.summary: Five9 (NASDAQ:FIVN) reported strong Q1 CY2026 results, surpassing revenue expectations with a 9.2% year-on-year increase to $305.3 million. The cloud contact center software provider also slightly raised its full-year revenue and Adjusted EPS guidance. Following the positive earnings report, the company's stock jumped 24.2%.

feed.title: Five9: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Five9 Inc. (FIVN) reported strong first-quarter earnings, exceeding Wall Street expectations. The cloud-based software provider announced net income of $18.4 million and revenue of $305.3 million. The company also provided optimistic guidance for the second quarter and the full fiscal year.

feed.title: First Industrial shareholders re-elect all directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. shareholders re-elected all six incumbent directors with over 93% support at their 2026 Annual Meeting. Frank E. Schmitz will join the board as an independent director on June 1, 2026, expanding it to seven members, six of whom are independent. The company, which operates 71.6 million square feet of industrial space, also announced strong Q1 2026 financial results, surpassing revenue and EPS expectations.

feed.title: Eastman Chemical: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Co. (EMN) reported first-quarter earnings of $107 million, or 93 cents per share, which adjusted to $1.09 per share. These results surpassed Wall Street expectations for earnings, which were predicted at $1.07 per share. However, the company's revenue of $2.18 billion fell short of analysts' forecasts of $2.21 billion.
